title: Real Brand Inspired Concept Kv Poster Generator AI
sourceTitle: Real Brand Inspired Concept KV Poster Generator AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Real-brand-inspired Concept Key Visual poster for Apple, automatically translating brand recognition into a polished commercial KV for X and social visual practice. Subject: representative performance running shoe and athletic apparel becomes the representative product hero for Apple, supported by recognizable brand-logo style, brand-name typography cues, packaging language, brand colors, material finish, and the selected target audience urban technology users who prefer minimal premium design. Scene: Brand atmosphere is inferred from the real category of Apple: technology, sports, beauty, luxury, automotive, beverage, coffee, fashion, home, or lifestyle, with space, props, color, and model presence matched to the brand temperament. Composition: 9:16 layout built as product hero KV: clear brand identity zone, product hero zone, readable slogan Closer to Tomorrow, brand atmosphere zone, clean information hierarchy, limited supporting text, and social-platform-ready spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved real brand inspired concept kv poster generator source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-recognition brand concept advertising poster, not a cheap flyer and not a random product image; premium commercial quality, strong key visual, accurate brand mood, clean layout, social sharing finish, and personal-learning concept-ad use. Color Palette: Automatically inferred authentic brand color system with representative primary and secondary colors, material-specific highlights, product packaging colors, and platform-appropriate contrast. Lighting: Brand-matched commercial lighting: restrained futuristic light for technology, kinetic contrast for sports, soft beauty light for cosmetics, controlled luxury shadows for premium goods, and fresh liquid sparkle for beverages when relevant. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
